Ishti |. Death in Jyeshta masa, first annual shraddha is during Adhika Jyeshta masa itself.

Katake Guru 12:49 |. Death after Jyeshta, the monthly (masika) shraddha has to be performed both in Adhika and Nija Jyeshta masas. Darsha shraddha has to be performed in both Adhika and Nija masas. Giving away as dana 33 nos. of Apoopas, a sweet made out of rice and jaggery is shta (very good) during this month. This is normally given in a new brass vessel with ghee in another con - tainer. Those who cannot give dana on all days of the masa should try and give on the special days: Shukla Dwadashi, Pournima, Krishna Ashtami, Navami, Dwadashi, Chathurdashi and Amavasya. [ ] [ ]

specialTithis.name: Pournima
specialTithis.rawText: Katake Guru 12:49 |. Death after Jyeshta, the monthly (masika) shraddha has to be performed both in Adhika and Nija Jyeshta masas. Darsha shraddha has to be performed in both Adhika and Nija masas. Giving away as dana 33 nos. of Apoopas, a sweet made out of rice and jaggery is shta (very good) during this month. This is normally given in a new brass vessel with ghee in another con - tainer. Those who cannot give dana on all days of the masa should try and give on the special days: Shukla Dwadashi, Pournima, Krishna Ashtami, Navami, Dwadashi, Chathurdashi and Amavasya. [ ] [ ]

specialTithis.name: Anadhyayana
specialTithis.rawText: Anadhyayana, Dwapara Yugadi (Shatabhisha Visesha), Ishti, Shivarathri Amavasya, Vishnu Panchaka Amavasya Upavasa, Kuhayoga Nivarana Dina (Vyasaraja Math 1524), Vyathishankha Darsha Shraddha - Amavasya Thilatharpanam % Sri Narayana Pandithacharya and his father Sri Trivikrama Pandithacharya are contemporaries of Sri Madhwacharya. There is no authentic information regarding their life history, the dates of Aradhane, or why there are Brindavanas for them (as they are known as Gruhasthas).
